records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe there's a tree just growing in the middle of the path like that... How strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wherever Shepherd goes, plants grow nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wherever Shepherd goes, plants grow nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wherever Shepherd goes, plants grow nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the adults said that it was an inconvenience because they grew on the floors and walls.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But the adults said that it was an inconvenience because they grew on the floors and walls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The plants are growing... because of you?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though there is no sky and sunlight, they grow faster in spring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, different plants grow depending on the season.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They also wither away if unattended, so Shepherd came here often to take care of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You helped it bear fruit?

records.m_Talk_FRA: You helped it bear fruit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People's heart shapes become long when they're hungry. Just like yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People's heart shapes become long when they're hungry. Just like yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People's heart shapes become long when they're hungry. Just like yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lurcher is always hungry. Maybe that's why he's always violent.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Lurcher is always hungry. Maybe that's why he's always violent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should eat before you get violent. Hurry.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You should eat before you get violent. Hurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-is that so...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-is that so...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-is that so...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen her eyes twinkle like that before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen her eyes twinkle like that before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen her eyes twinkle like that before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This might be a Corrupted Area... but I guess there's nothing to be careful about now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This might be a Corrupted Area... but I guess there's nothing to be careful about now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This might be a Corrupted Area... but I guess there's nothing to be careful about now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? It's sweet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? It's sweet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? It's sweet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is pretty good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is pretty good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is pretty good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd can't taste. So Shepherd was a little worried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd can't taste. So Shepherd was a little worried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd can't taste. So Shepherd was a little worried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the tree we fell on top of when that monster was chasing us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the tree we fell on top of when that monster was chasing us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the tree we fell on top of when that monster was chasing us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shepherd remembers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shepherd remembers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shepherd remembers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd used to eat ice here often.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd used to eat ice here often.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd used to eat ice here often.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whenever an experiment was done, the person dear to Shepherd brought Shepherd here and helped Shepherd cool down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whenever an experiment was done, the person dear to Shepherd brought Shepherd here and helped Shepherd cool down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whenever an experiment was done, the person dear to Shepherd brought Shepherd here and helped Shepherd cool down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... really like ice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... really like ice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... really like ice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. Shepherd can't taste, but Shepherd likes refreshing things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. Shepherd can't taste, but Shepherd likes refreshing things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. Shepherd can't taste, but Shepherd likes refreshing things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how tall this tree is, you must've come here quite a lot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how tall this tree is, you must've come here quite a lot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how tall this tree is, you must've come here quite a lot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only Shepherd and the person dear to Shepherd come here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only Shepherd and the person dear to Shepherd come here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only Shepherd and the person dear to Shepherd come here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why when he left, Shepherd hid here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why when he left, Shepherd hid here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why when he left, Shepherd hid here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Five years... That's how long it's probably been.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Five years... That's how long it's probably been.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Five years... That's how long it's probably been.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must've been lonely waiting here all alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must've been lonely waiting here all alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must've been lonely waiting here all alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. Shepherd was sleeping.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. Shepherd was sleeping.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. Shepherd was sleeping.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, Shepherd had a dream that time too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, Shepherd had a dream that time too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, Shepherd had a dream that time too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... Shepherd can't remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... Shepherd can't remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... Shepherd can't remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I also forget stuff when I wake up in the morning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I also forget stuff when I wake up in the morning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I also forget stuff when I wake up in the morning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The problem for me is that... I forget the important stuff nowadays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The problem for me is that... I forget the important stuff nowadays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The problem for me is that... I forget the important stuff nowadays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your color... It suddenly became sad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your color... It suddenly became sad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your color... It suddenly became sad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, it's not your fault.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, it's not your fault.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, it's not your fault.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And, it's not that I want to hide it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And, it's not that I want to hide it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And, it's not that I want to hide it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know, these kinds of regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know, these kinds of regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know, these kinds of regrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... really are similar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... really are similar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... really are similar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...? Similar? To what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...? Similar? To what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...? Similar? To what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Scary heart...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. It's because of Shepherd, isn't it? Because Shepherd makes a lot of mistakes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, it's not your fault.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, it's not your fault.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, it's not your fault.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... since you can see emotion, I guess I can't hide it in front of you, Shepherd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you want to hide it? Then Shepherd can just close Shepherd's eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to do that. You might bump into a tree again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And, it's not that I want to hide it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And, it's not that I want to hide it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And, it's not that I want to hide it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I've just gotten used to hiding my feelings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I regret it a little. I should've expressed them more when I had the chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I knew this was going to happen... then I would've said that I loved you more back then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know, these kinds of regrets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know, these kinds of regrets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know, these kinds of regrets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... really are similar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... really are similar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... really are similar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...? Similar? To what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...? Similar? To what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...? Similar? To what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The person dear to Shepherd also smiled like that when he was sad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The time you helped me when I was surrounded by C.O.s... did you do that because you felt something similar to that person from me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Shepherd promised not to be seen by other people, so Shepherd ran.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also there was someone with a scary heart too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also there was someone with a scary heart too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also there was someone with a scary heart too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Scary heart...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Scary heart...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Scary heart...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on?
